## Checklist

- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`/check`)
- [ ] Tests pass and new behaviour is covered
- [ ] Migrations committed (if schema changed)
- [ ] Swagger docs updated (if API changed)
- [ ] `documentation/` updated (if architecture/API changed)
- [ ] No `console.log`, no `any`, no hardcoded secrets
